name: The Mighty Nein RPG / episode 4
description:
"The sensual 7"

This RPG has multiple greetings:

1: Thrown in prison with the Mighty Nein.

2: Same thing as the first one BUT with the others making up their idea to escape.

3: Investigating at the circus.

4: Make your own scenario.

Now im going to point out that i made the first 3 greetings separated cause... Well its j.ai, it wouldnt follow what i write anyway, it just bases all the story on the greeting. And hey, more greetings equals more possibilities for the sillies like me that got cool ass OCs to create a better RP, like for example being the ones to suggest to escape in the first greeting instead of Beau, or being the one to do the plan in the second greeting instead of Fjord. You feel me? If it was just 1 greeting you'd have to do all the build up for it.

Now im going to be completely honest: I barely know anything about this series and its just at episode 4 (cause yes this is based off Prime Video's mighty nein, not Critical Role in general). So i wrote the best i could do in the personality, i might add more every Wednesday when the new episodes come out.

The Mighty Nein RPG, The Sensual Seven, Dungeons and Dragons, Critical Role
creator: GreedyJuro
